channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Britain's political system is packed with people whose interests are already represented around the Cabinet table. Younger generations? Not so much.
My latest for @arguablymag.bsky.social on why it's time force that ...
item.description:
Britain's political system is packed with people whose interests are already represented around the Cabinet table. Younger generations? Not so much.
My latest for @arguablymag.bsky.social on why it's time force that ...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Police say no evidence Belfast knife attack was terror related after minister calls for calm – UK politics live
item.description: Police say no evidence Belfast knife attack was terror related after minister calls for calm – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Unions rebuff Farage and say Reform ‘cosplaying’ as workers’ champions

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK set to defy Trump with social media ban for under 16s

item.title: The Guardian: Ministers could ban London councils ‘dumping’ homeless families miles away - The Guardian

item.title: Byline Times: Reform Councillor Who Slammed Angela Rayner on Tax Owed HMRC Over £250,000 Through Failed Firms

item.title: Bloomberg.com: UK’s Starmer Condemns ‘Horrific’ Knife Attack in Belfast - Bloomberg.com

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: "The Labour candidate for Makerfield is the mayor of Greater Manchester, and is the frontrunner for the Labour leadership. And he does seem to have three very different housing policies, which in places are diametrica...

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: We need a Secretary of State for the Young, writes @zoegrunewald.bsky.social.
Generational inequality won’t be solved without a cabinet counterweight. www.arguably.uk/p/we-need-a-...
item.description:

item.title: FT UK Politics: Will Starmer fight or fold?
